::: {.home-header}
PhD Candidate in Economics  
University of Graz
:::

::: {.home-intro}
::: {.home-text}
My research focuses on microeconomic theory, information economics, communication games, and information design. I study strategic communication, especially how information structures shape what can be credibly communicated in games.

I will be on the academic job market in 2026-27.

You can find my [CV here](assets/cv_elshan_garashli_unigraz.pdf).
:::

::: {.home-photo}
![](assets/profile.jpg){fig-alt="Elshan Garashli" .profile-photo}
:::
:::

### Upcoming seminars and conferences

#### 2026

| Dates | Event | Location |
|---|---|---|
| 13–18 July | SAET | Rio de Janeiro |
| 20–23 July | PET | Rio de Janeiro |

### Contact

Department for Organization and Institutional Economics  
University of Graz  
Graz, Austria  

Email: [elshan.garashli@gmail.com](mailto:elshan.garashli@gmail.com)
